task: I need to send a quick note to my supervisor about a schedule change, but I only have a rough draft right now. Can you help me turn it into a short message I could send today?

turns.agent_response: Sure — paste your rough draft and I’ll tighten it up into a short text you can send today.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, here’s the rough draft:

Hi [Supervisor Name], I wanted to let you know I need a schedule change for this week. Something came up and I won’t be able to make my usual shift on [day/time]. I’m sorry for the inconvenience. I can cover [other day/time] if that helps, or I can work with whatever you need. Let me know what works best.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a shorter, cleaner version:

**Hi [Supervisor Name], I need a schedule change this week and can’t make my usual shift on [day/time]. Sorry for the short notice. I can cover [other day/time] if that helps, or I’m happy to work with whatever you need. Let me know what works best.**

If you want, I can make it:
- **more casual**
- **more firm**
- **even shorter**

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clean. I can send that.
